name: accessibility-agents
description: WCAG AA accessibility specialists for GitHub Copilot Chat -- 64 agents via @a11y slash commands covering ARIA, contrast, keyboard, forms, documents, GitHub workflows, and more. Includes SARIF diagnostics, axe-core scanning, and MCP server integration.

a11y.agentsPath.markdownDescription: (Legacy) Single path to the directory containing `.agent.md` files. Prefer `a11y.agentsPaths` for multiple directories. Leave empty to auto-discover.

a11y.agentsPaths.markdownDescription: List of directories containing `.agent.md` files. Leave empty to auto-discover `.github/agents/`, `copilot-agents/`, and `agents/` in workspace folders.

a11y.watchForChanges.markdownDescription: Watch `.agent.md` files for changes and update the agent index automatically.

a11y.defaultAgent.markdownDescription: Agent file stem used when `@a11y` is invoked without a slash command. Must match a `<name>.agent.md` file.

enumDescriptions: All agents are accessible via @a11y /agent-name slash commands under a single chat participant. This is the default and keeps the participant picker clean.

Each user-invokable agent is registered as its own @agent-name chat participant (e.g. @aria-specialist, @contrast-master). No slash commands on @a11y — agents are top-level @ participants. Best when you want direct @ access without a hub.
Both modes at once: agents are available as @a11y /agent-name AND as individual @agent-name participants. Gives maximum flexibility but adds many entries to the participant picker.
a11y.registrationMode.markdownDescription:
Controls how agents appear in Copilot Chat.

- **slash-commands** (default): Single `@a11y` participant with `/agent-name` slash commands. Clean and organized.
- **individual-participants**: Each agent gets its own `@agent-name` handle. Direct `@` access without going through `@a11y`.
- **both**: Agents available both ways.

⚠️ Changing this setting requires a **window reload** to take effect.

a11y.conformanceLevel.markdownDescription: Target WCAG conformance level. Agents will tailor their advice to this level.

enumDescriptions: All rules enabled, all severities reported.
All rules enabled, errors and warnings only.
a11y.scanProfile.markdownDescription: Scan profile controlling which axe-core rules and severity levels are included in scan results.

a11y.autoScanOnSave.markdownDescription: Automatically run a lightweight accessibility lint when saving HTML, JSX, TSX, Vue, Svelte, or Astro files.

a11y.mcpServerUrl.markdownDescription: URL of the A11y Agent Team MCP server for remote scanning and audit persistence. Leave empty to disable.

a11y.mcpTransport.markdownDescription: Transport protocol for the MCP server connection.
